text:
Pushed a fresh coat of pixelated paint this week.

PR #8902 is merged, bringing a new palette system, updated scene backgrounds, and better color handling across the board. The old gray blocks have been consumed by the void (and Nomnom). Everything feels a bit warmer and softer now, like someone finally turned on the ambient lighting in the codebase.

Come look at the new colors on the site.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdesign #frontend #buildinpublic #colorpalette #uiux
